pi_items.source: verifier.py logic and task description instructions

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openvsp_env openvsp_mdao_desvar_setup task by confirming that the task operates on the real NASA eCRM-001 conceptual aircraft model, while the target design variable bounds are synthetically specified via the prompt instructions. Verified that the expected model output path '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_mdao.vsp3', report output path '/home/ga/Desktop/desvar_summary.txt', and all target bound numerical constraints exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and verifier.py. Discovered a critical defect: verifier.py incorrectly uses `geom.find('Name')` to extract component names from the VSP3 XML. Because OpenVSP encapsulates `<Name>` inside `<ParmContainer>`, this query silently returns None for all components, causing the verifier to perpetually fail all bound checks (awarding 0 of 75 possible model points). This caps the maximum possible score at 25 points (report + VLM), rendering the task programmatically impossible to pass (threshold 60) even with a perfect execution.
